name: Offline – Build Question Bank from Lesson (Lesson Bundle → Supabase) deepseek -12/2

parameters.content:
## Notes
1. This workflow builds a question bank from a single LESSON_TEXT using DeepSeek.
2. The Set – Lesson Metadata node is where you paste your synthetic lesson for now.
3. Supabase – Insert Questions needs column mappings configured in the n8n UI.
4. Later, we can swap the Set node to pull lessons from Supabase instead of hardcoding.
